title: Typo in podman-build.1.md.in
body:
### Issue Description

https://docs.podman.io/en/stable/markdown/podman-build.1.html#building-an-image-using-a-git-repository :

> Podman fetches the archive file, decompress it, and use its contents as the build context.

→ *decompressES*, *useS*

In the same file:

> Podman clones the specified GitHub repository to a temporary location and use it as the context.

→ *useS*

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Not applicable.

### Describe the results you received

Not applicable.

### Describe the results you expected

Not applicable.

Not applicable.
